title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das argues that the AI agent industry has normalized unreliability, with errors compounding rapidly across multi-step workflows even at high per-step accuracy. He contends that shipping production-grade agents requires building reliability first, emphasizing taste-driven development and continuous dogfooding over raw performance metrics.
